tools.name: followup_create
tools.description: Create a follow-up tracker for a sent message. Tracks conversations awaiting a response across channels (email, Slack, WhatsApp, etc.).

conversation_id.description: External conversation identifier on that channel

contact_id.description: Optional contact ID from the contact graph. Used for grace period context.

expected_response_hours.description: Hours to wait for a response before marking as overdue. If omitted, no deadline is set.

reminder_schedule_id.description: Optional recurrence schedule ID to fire a reminder when overdue

tools.name: followup_list
tools.description: List follow-ups with optional filters by status, channel, or contact. Can also show only overdue follow-ups.

status.description: Filter by status (pending, resolved, overdue, nudged)

channel.description: Filter by communication channel (e.g. email, slack)

overdue_only.description: When true, return only pending follow-ups past their expected response deadline

tools.name: followup_resolve
tools.description: Manually resolve a follow-up by ID, or auto-resolve by channel + conversation ID when a response is received.

channel.description: Channel to match (used with conversation_id for auto-resolution)

conversation_id.description: Conversation ID to match (used with channel for auto-resolution)
